en.extract:
Whistling green pigeon has been split into the following species:

Ryukyu green pigeon, Treron permagnus, endemic to Japan
Taiwan green pigeon, Treron formosae, found in Taiwan and Bahanes
en.wikitext:
'''Whistling green pigeon''' has been split into the following species:

* [[Ryukyu green pigeon]], ''Treron permagnus'', endemic to Japan
* [[Taiwan green pigeon]], ''Treron formosae'', found in Taiwan and Bahanes
